item.description:
### 🐛 修复 - 修复删除当前选中 item 后，选中框不会自动切换到相邻 item 的问题。
### ✨ 新增 - 新增横版搜索按钮的动态展开效果。 - 新增横版搜索按钮未激活时的图标态展示。
### ⚡ 优化 - 优化竖版 item 标题位置与样式，显示更清晰、更醒目。 - 优化横版搜索框展开动画，整体更丝滑自然。
---
### 🐛 Fixed - Fixed an issue where deleting the currently selected item would not automatically move selection to the adjacent item.
### ✨ Added - Added an animated expand interaction for the horizontal search button. - Added an icon-only idle state for the horizontal search button.
### ⚡ Improved - Improved the position and styling of vertical item titles for better clarity and visibility. - Improved the horizontal search expansion animation for a smoother feel.

🆕 新增功能
- ✨ 新增「标题添加」功能，支持通过标题快速搜索内容，查找更高效
🎨 界面优化
- 🧭 优化竖版剪切板 UI，视觉与操作体验更流畅 - 🎬 优化剪切板开启动画，过渡更加自然
🐛 问题修复
- 🔧 修复滚动时被强制居中的问题，浏览体验更自由
---
🆕 New Features
- ✨ Added Title Support — you can now add titles and search content by title for faster retrieval
🎨 Improvements
- 🧭 Refined vertical clipboard UI for a smoother and more intuitive experience - 🎬 Improved clipboard opening animations with more natural transitions
🐛 Bug Fixes
- 🔧 Fixed the issue where scrolling was forcibly centered, enabling more flexible navigation

#### 💎 核心更新 * **收藏功能**：新增收藏分组，引入「独立删除校验」机制。该分组现已受系统保护，防止任何外部同步或批量清理导致的意外删除，确保核心数据持久化。 * **UI 交互焕新**：横版剪切板界面 100% 重新设计。优化了视觉重心与动效反馈，为宽屏工作流提供更生动、更沉浸的交互体验。 * **个性化视觉配置**：新增分组图标显示开关。支持根据使用习惯自定义界面复杂度，进一步优化视觉降噪。
#### ⚡️ 性能优化 * **渲染引擎升级**：深度优化了长列表滚动与实时预览的内存占用。通过改进渲染管线，在高频触发场景下依然能保持满帧级的流畅度。
#### 🛠 稳定性增强 * **修复 Dock 栏异常驻留**：彻底解决了特定条件下 App 图标在 Dock 栏“假死”残留的逻辑错误，优化了应用生命周期的退出机制。 * **琐碎细节修复**：消除已知边缘 Bug，提升系统整体运行的稳健性。
---
#### 💎 Core Updates * **Favorite Functionality**: Add the favorites group with a new "Independent Deletion Verification" mechanism. The Favorites group is now protected from external syncs or batch cleanups to ensure data persistence. * **UI/UX Redesign**: 100% overhaul of the horizontal clipboard interface. Optimized visual focus and motion feedback to provide a more vivid and immersive experience for wide-screen workflows. * **Visual Personalization**: Added a toggle for group icons. Users can now customize interface complexity and reduce visual noise based on personal preference.
#### ⚡️ Performance Improvements * **Rendering Engine Optimization**: Significantly reduced memory footprint for long-list scrolling and real-time previews. Enhanced the rendering pipeline to maintain peak frame rates during high-frequency interactions.
#### 🛠 Stability Enhancements * **Dock Persistence Fix**: Resolved a logic error causing the app icon to intermittently persist in the Dock after termination, optimizing the application lifecycle management. * **Refinements**: Addressed various minor edge-case bugs to improve overall system robustness.
